action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with no code. Analysis: Need to build a complete pipeline for CIFAR-100 with ~40% noisy labels. Key strategies: (1) Use pretrained CLIP ViT-B/16 for strong features, (2) Start with simple cross-entropy to get baseline, (3) Later add noise-robust techniques. Decision: Build all files, train 5 epochs quickly, submit eval to measure time.
action.command: python explore_data.py && EPOCHS=5 BATCH_SIZE=64 LR=1e-4 python train.py
